description_long: This object is a long, precision-crafted shotgun with a robust metallic barrel and a wooden stock featuring a dark, polished finish. The barrel is extended and slender, with a bipod attachment near the muzzle for stability during firing. The receiver and action area are metallic, with visible mechanical details and a prominent bolt handle. The stock is fitted with a thick, cushioned buttpad and an adjustable cheek rest, suggesting ergonomic considerations for the shooter. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, enclosing a single trigger, and the grip is contoured for comfort and control. The overall design is utilitarian yet refined, blending wood and metal elements for both durability and aesthetic appeal.
description: A long, metallic shotgun with a wooden stock, bipod, and ergonomic features, blending robust metalwork with polished wood. It has a cushioned buttpad, adjustable cheek rest, and a prominent bolt-action mechanism.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle, bipod legs, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the long barrel, bipod, wooden stock, adjustable cheek rest, and the bolt-action mechanism.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the thick buttpad, cheek rest, and the narrow alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the bolt handle and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with a bipod attachment near the muzzle
attribute_stock_type: full stock with adjustable cheek rest and thick buttpad
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
